nasb.text: But Moses said before the Lord, “Behold, I am unskilled in speech; how then will Pharaoh listen to me?”

esv.text: But Moses said to the Lord, “Behold, I am of uncircumcised lips. How will Pharaoh listen to me?”

cnv.text: 摩西在耶和華面前說：“你看，我是個拙口笨舌的人，法老怎肯聽我呢？”

ccb.text: 摩西却对耶和华说：“你看，我拙口笨舌，法老怎肯听我的话？”
